verses.text: The seventh seal opened, 'there was silence in heaven about... half an hour'; seven angels are given seven trumpets. Hushed heaven. A solemn pause before new judgments.
The seventh seal opened, 'there was silence in heaven about... half an hour'; seven angels are given seven trumpets. Hushed heaven. A solemn pause before new judgments.
An angel offers 'much incense' with the prayers of saints; then casts fire to the earth, with thunders and quake. Prayers rise. The saints' prayers loose answering judgment.
An angel offers 'much incense' with the prayers of saints; then casts fire to the earth, with thunders and quake. Prayers rise. The saints' prayers loose answering judgment.
An angel offers 'much incense' with the prayers of saints; then casts fire to the earth, with thunders and quake. Prayers rise. The saints' prayers loose answering judgment.
The first trumpet: hail and fire mingled with blood; 'the third part of trees was burnt up,' and all green grass. First woe. A third of the land is scorched.
The first trumpet: hail and fire mingled with blood; 'the third part of trees was burnt up,' and all green grass. First woe. A third of the land is scorched.
The second: a burning mountain cast into the sea; a third 'became blood,' and a third of sea life died. Sea struck. The waters too feel God's hand.
The second: a burning mountain cast into the sea; a third 'became blood,' and a third of sea life died. Sea struck. The waters too feel God's hand.
The third: a great star 'Wormwood' falls; a third of the rivers turn bitter, and many die. Bitter waters. The springs of life are poisoned.
The third: a great star 'Wormwood' falls; a third of the rivers turn bitter, and many die. Bitter waters. The springs of life are poisoned.
The fourth: a third of sun, moon, and stars darkened; an angel cries, 'Woe, woe, woe, to the inhabiters of the earth.' Darkened sky. Worse woes are yet announced.
The fourth: a third of sun, moon, and stars darkened; an angel cries, 'Woe, woe, woe, to the inhabiters of the earth.' Darkened sky. Worse woes are yet announced.
